recommendations.title: No Direction Home: Bob Dylan
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of Bob Dylan's strange evolution between 1961 and 1966 from folk singer to protest singer to "voice of a generation" to rock star.

recommendations.title: Avicii - I'm Tim
recommendations.overview: Before Avicii, there was Tim. Through his own words, witness how a prodigious musical talent became one of the defining artists of his generation.

recommendations.title: The Last Waltz
recommendations.overview: Martin Scorsese's documentary intertwines footage from The Band's incredible farewell tour with probing backstage interviews and featured performances by Eric Clapton, Bob Dylan, Joni Mitchell, Van Morrison, and other rock legends.

recommendations.title: Baraka
recommendations.overview: A paralysingly beautiful documentary with a global vision—an odyssey through landscape and time—that attempts to capture the essence of life.

recommendations.title: Glee: The Concert Movie
recommendations.overview: A concert documentary shot during the Glee Live! In Concert! summer 2011 tour, featuring song performances and fans' life stories and how the show influenced them.

recommendations.title: Rolling Thunder Revue: A Bob Dylan Story by Martin Scorsese
recommendations.overview: Part documentary, part concert film, part fever dream, this film captures the troubled spirit of America in 1975 and the joyous music that Dylan performed during the fall of that year.

recommendations.title: Miss Americana
recommendations.overview: A raw and emotionally revealing look at one of the most iconic artists of our time during a transformational period in her life as she learns to embrace her role not only as a songwriter and performer, but as a woman harnessing the full power of her

recommendations.title: I'm Not There
recommendations.overview: Six actors portray six personas of music legend Bob Dylan in scenes depicting various stages of his life, chronicling his rise from unknown folksinger to international icon and revealing how Dylan constantly reinvented himself.

recommendations.title: Searching for Sugar Man
recommendations.overview: Two South Africans set out to discover what happened to their unlikely musical hero, the mysterious 1970s rock 'n' roller, Rodriguez.

recommendations.title: 20,000 Days on Earth
recommendations.overview: A semi-fictionalized documentary about a day in the life of Australian musician Nick Cave's persona.
